Implemented `task_8618d23e`. Rule: split the even-height input into equal top and bottom halves, append a `9` column to the right of the top half, prepend a `9` column to the left of the bottom half, and insert an all-`9` separator row between them. I used the summary hint because both hint files matched the official examples; no new DSL primitive was needed.

The generator matches the task family by sampling compact dense grids with small palettes excluding `9`, repeated row templates, and mild top/bottom palette separation, which reproduces the official task’s small dense split-half look without inventing extra structure.
